hook.name: SwingHook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for an ETH/SWING token pool that applies a custom fee delta in beforeSwap for buy-side trades and validates min-output and authorizes settlement in afterSwap. Supports two trade modes via optional hookData: standard Uniswap swaps and Swing-specific swaps that create randomness-based tickets for lottery-style settlement via an external randomness manager.
